Interface PlottingBackend

All Superinterfaces:
Backend
All Known Implementing Classes:
JavaFXPlot2DBackend, JavaFXPlot3DBackend, JFreeChartPlot2DBackend, Jzy3dPlot3DBackend, XChartPlot2DBackend
public interface PlottingBackend extends Backend
Interface for analytical plotting backends (2D/3D).
Since:
1.2
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)
